# Stocky AI

> AI-powered trading assistant for Indian stock markets, built by Charandeep Kapoor.

Stocky AI is a personal AI trading assistant that integrates with Zerodha for real-time stock analysis, portfolio automation, and trade execution on NSE and BSE.

## Key Features

- AI stock analysis (fundamental, technical, news sentiment)
- Zerodha Kite integration for live trading
- Real-time market news from 25+ RSS sources with AI summaries
- Deep Research mode with dual-agent AI system
- Market scanning (breakouts, 52W high/low, volume pumps)
- Stock comparison and interactive charting
- Sector rotation analysis (Relative Rotation Graph)
- IPO tracking and macro dashboard
- Portfolio, holdings, and margin overview

## Links

- Landing Page: https://stockyai.xyz
- Web App: https://llm.stockyai.xyz
- Terminal: https://terminal.stockyai.xyz
- Creator: https://charandeepkapoor.com

## Technical Stack

- Backend: FastAPI + Groq LLM (llama-3.3-70b)
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Trading: Zerodha Kite Connect API
- Data: yfinance, nsetools, 25+ RSS feeds, NSE/BSE APIs
